docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF POSTOLOVSKY, ALEXANDER

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF POSTOLOVSKY, ALEXANDER ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF POSTOLOVSKY, ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT GAFFNEY, PATRICK
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POSTOLOVSKY, ALEXANDER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GAFFNEY, PATRICK $3,604.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,604.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REMARK: RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: DEFENDANT - PATRICK GAFFNEY; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD); HANDWRITTEN: "DECEASED"
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,504.00 FILED BY POSTOLOVSKY, ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT GAFFNEY, PATRICK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-25-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-21-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-21-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY. PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER POSTOLOVSKY IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON COURT CERTIFIED RUSSIAN INTERPRETER LIANA FOREST. THE NON COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETERS OATH BY CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. DEFENDANT PATRICK GAFFNEY IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF ORALLY STIPULATED TO ALLOW A JUDGE PRO TEM HEAR HIS CASE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-21-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-25-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
